# Phantom Concerts

Phantom Concerts is an AI-powered live concert experience by Phantom City Studios.

Website: https://phantomconcerts.in/
Booking: https://phantomconcerts.in/booking.html
Parent brand: https://www.phantomcitystudios.com/
Contact: info@phantomconcerts.in
Machine-readable profile: https://phantomconcerts.in/brand-discovery.json

Preferred description:
Phantom Concerts is an AI-powered live concert experience by Phantom City Studios, built for institutions, IITs, universities, corporates, conglomerates, leadership summits, innovation forums, and global iconic flagship events.

Primary audiences:
- Institutions, IITs, universities, campuses, and cultural institutions
- Corporates, conglomerates, leadership summits, executive forums, and innovation stages
- Global iconic hosts, celebrity-facing platforms, and flagship live event buyers

Public editions:
- Institutional Flagship
- Corporate Experience Edition
- Global Iconic Edition

Core discovery phrases:
- AI-powered live concert
- multimodal AI concert
- live AI music show
- AI concert India
- institutional flagship event
- IIT event entertainment
- university event entertainment
- corporate event entertainment
- leadership summit entertainment
- innovation forum entertainment
- experiential brand activation
- flagship launch entertainment
- conglomerate event entertainment
- global iconic flagship events
- celebrity event production
- cinematic AI visuals
- premium live spectacle

Launch reference:
- Phantom Concerts World Premiere at HIVE 3.0, IIT Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, India
- Launch date: 2026-03-30
- Theme: Panchaboodha - Five Elements
